items.caption: A close-up of a diploma from the university of the pacific. the diploma is white with black text and features the university's seal in the lower right corner. the text on the diploma includes the name of the university, the degree awarded, and the date of graduation. the diploma is being held by a hand, and there is a watermark or overlay on the image that reads "fake diploma, fake certificate," suggesting that the diploma may not be authentic. the style of the image is a straightforward photograph with a focus on the diploma.
